name: For systems that cannot be patched (e.g.
description: legacy POS): Segregation from the rest of the network via strict firewall rules and host-based IPS.

name: For devices unable to support WPA2/3: Usage of a secure VPN tunnel for all wireless traffic to bypass the weak encryption layer.
For mainframes/consoles that cannot support digital MFA: "Something you have" is enforced via physical cage keys/biometric room access + "Something you know" (password).
